section.heading: Enlistment to serve against United States

content.p: Whoever enlists or is engaged within the United States or in any place subject to the jurisdiction thereof, with intent to serve in armed hostility against the United States, shall be fined under this title 11 See 1994 Amendment note below. or imprisoned not more than three years, or both.

note.heading: Historical and Revision Notes
note.p: Mandatory punishment provision was rephrased in the alternative.
Minor changes were made in phraseology.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1994—Pub. L. 103–322, which directed the amendment of this section by striking “fined not more than $100” and inserting “fined under this title”, was executed by substituting “fined under this title” for “fined $100”, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.
